metadata.name: xlsxtofits
metadata.summary: A Python package to convert XLSX files to FITS files.

functions.name: xiang.converter.xlsx_to_fits
documentation:
Convert an XLSX file to a FITS file.

Parameters:
    input_file (str): Path to the input XLSX file.
    output_file (str): Path to the output FITS file.

functions.name: xiang.cli.main
documentation: Command-line interface for the xlsx_to_fits package.
